# Cyclone DDS 11.0.1 TypeInformation golden test data
# Generated by: docker build -t typeinfo-dump testdata/typeinfo/ && docker run --rm typeinfo-dump
#
# Format: TYPE_NAME size=N bytes=<hex>
#
# Wire format (from analysis):
#   TypeInformation: MUTABLE (DHEADER + EMHEADER per member)
#     @id(0x1001) minimal: TypeIdentifierWithDependencies (APPENDABLE with DHEADER)
#       typeid_with_size: TypeIdentifierWithSize (APPENDABLE with DHEADER)
#         TypeIdentifier: octet discriminator union (FINAL)
#         uint32 typeobject_serialized_size
#       int32 dependent_typeid_count
#       sequence<TypeIdentifierWithSize>: wrapped in DHEADER
#     @id(0x1002) complete: same structure
#
# NO encapsulation header in the data.
#
SimpleType size=100 bytes=6000000001100040280000002400000014000000f18ea5a80251229848dcf89114089a004800000000000000040000000000000002100040280000002400000014000000f2768687130d152894ec4dbcf863200077000000000000000400000000000000
SensorData size=100 bytes=6000000001100040280000002400000014000000f1c0caacfebb29f0ad78572a99a628006700000000000000040000000000000002100040280000002400000014000000f2b8fd9599703c8bff88472f92227300bd000000000000000400000000000000
ArrayType size=100 bytes=6000000001100040280000002400000014000000f13f839d04fef472cb741a28ea3842004300000000000000040000000000000002100040280000002400000014000000f28f07b3210a59c16706dc41e9d9cd0068000000000000000400000000000000
SequenceType size=100 bytes=6000000001100040280000002400000014000000f11d2668b6f03de4b4a4ea8ca8e849003b00000000000000040000000000000002100040280000002400000014000000f217b5331ba24c11db6098413055780069000000000000000400000000000000
EnumStruct size=148 
OuterType size=148 
AppendableType size=100 bytes=6000000001100040280000002400000014000000f11233927debad474c31c03690c741003800000000000000040000000000000002100040280000002400000014000000f2a216cb5953079e66a7d93390361e0064000000000000000400000000000000
MutableType size=100 bytes=6000000001100040280000002400000014000000f185569d63d4fa919121ba892016d0003800000000000000040000000000000002100040280000002400000014000000f2be465bca17748f4d0148655886190066000000000000000400000000000000
